scripts.test:ideas: curl -i --request POST 'http://localhost:54321/functions/v1/recipe-ideas-generation' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"prompt": "A quick weeknight dinner with chicken and vegetables"}'
scripts.test:creation: curl -i --request POST 'http://localhost:54321/functions/v1/recipe-creation' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"recipeIdea": {"id": "chicken-stir-fry", "title": "Quick Chicken Stir-Fry", "description": "A flavorful and easy weeknight dinner with tender chicken, colorful vegetables, and a savory sauce."}, "originalPrompt": "A healthy stir-fry recipe for weeknight dinners"}'
scripts.test:ai-chef-chat: curl -i --request POST 'http://localhost:54321/functions/v1/ai-chef-chat' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"currentRecipe": {"id": "test-recipe", "title": "Chocolate Chip Cookies", "description": "Classic chocolate chip cookies", "servings": 24, "images": [], "ingredients": [{"id": "1", "name": "All-purpose flour", "quantity": 2.25, "unit": "cups", "notes": null}], "instructions": [{"id": "section-1", "section_title": "Preparation", "steps": [{"id": "step-1", "text": "Mix ingredients", "timing": null}]}], "notes": [], "tags": [], "time_estimate": {"prep": 15, "cook": 10, "rest": 0, "total": 25}, "user_id": "test-user", "is_public": true}, "chatHistory": [{"id": "1", "text": "Can you make this recipe healthier?", "sender": "user", "timestamp": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}'
scripts.test:ai-chef-chat:detailed: curl -i --request POST 'http://localhost:54321/functions/v1/ai-chef-chat' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"currentRecipe": {"id": "test-recipe", "title": "Chocolate Chip Cookies", "description": "Classic chocolate chip cookies", "servings": 24, "images": [], "ingredients": [{"id": "flour-1", "name": "All-purpose flour", "quantity": 2.25, "unit": "cups", "notes": null}, {"id": "sugar-1", "name": "Granulated sugar", "quantity": 0.75, "unit": "cup", "notes": null}, {"id": "brown-sugar-1", "name": "Brown sugar", "quantity": 0.75, "unit": "cup", "notes": null}, {"id": "butter-1", "name": "Butter", "quantity": 1, "unit": "cup", "notes": "softened"}], "instructions": [{"id": "section-1", "section_title": "Preparation", "steps": [{"id": "step-1", "text": "Preheat oven to 375°F", "timing": null}, {"id": "step-2", "text": "Mix @[All-purpose flour](flour-1) with baking soda and salt", "timing": null}]}, {"id": "section-2", "section_title": "Mixing", "steps": [{"id": "step-3", "text": "Cream @[Butter](butter-1) with @[Granulated sugar](sugar-1) and @[Brown sugar](brown-sugar-1) until smooth", "timing": null}]}], "notes": ["Store in an airtight container"], "tags": ["dessert", "baking"], "time_estimate": {"prep": 15, "cook": 10, "rest": 0, "total": 25}, "user_id": "test-user", "is_public": true}, "chatHistory": [{"id": "1", "text": "Can you make this recipe healthier?", "sender": "user", "timestamp": "2023-01-01T00:00:00Z"}]}'
